# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: sleep-nginx
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sleep
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      labels:
        app: sleep
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: openzipkin/sleeper:latest
        name: sleep-nginx
        command: ["/bin/sleep", "15"]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sleep-nginx
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # This must be removed for k8s version 1.24+ and 1.30+
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 9999 
    protocol: TCP 
  selector:
    app: sleep
<pr_diff><pr_file>/content/k8s-manifests/sidecar.istio.io-false/index.md<pr_diff_hunk>@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@

 kind: Pod
 metadata:
